Class Equality

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JAbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.Equality
All Implemented Interfaces:
Sorted, Named, Operator, SortedOperator, Sorted, SyntaxElement
public final class Equality extends JAbstractSortedOperator
This class defines the logic equality operator =. It is a binary predicate accepting arbitrary terms (of sort "any") as arguments. It also defines the formula equivalence operator <-> (which could alternatively be seen as a Junctor).

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Equality
    EQUALS
    the usual 'equality' operator '='
    static final Equality
    EQV
    the usual 'equivalence' operator <-> (be A, B formulae then A <-> B is true if and only if A and B have the same truth value
